summary: Starmer, muy cerca de dejar de ser primer ministro británico porque un sector creciente de los laboristas piensa que con él no va a ninguna parte. Leer

title: Irán paraliza la negociación con EEUU tras las nuevas amenazas de Trump
summary: Delegaciones de ambos países se habían reunido en Suiza para iniciar conversaciones tras la firma del acuerdo, pero poco después la República Islámica se levantó de la mesa. Leer

title: Colombia elige presidente en medio de la confrontación social y política
summary: Este domingo los colombianos están llamados a las urnas para elegir entre dos modelos radicalmente opuestos en lo económico y en lo social. Leer

title: Un Reino Unido dividido se acerca a la UE y debate un posible retorno
summary: Una mayoría del país reconoce el error del Brexit y el regreso ya no es un tabú. El Gobierno da pasos hacia Bruselas, que se cortarían en seco con una victoria de la derecha en 2029. Leer

title: Judge in case of Spanish PM's wife to face disciplinary proceedings
summary: Spain's judicial watchdog said Monday it has opened disciplinary proceedings against the judge investigating Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez's wife for graft, a case putting pressure on his minority government.

title: TELL US: Ten years on, how has Brexit affected your life and time in Spain?
summary: Tuesday June 23rd marks exactly ten years since the Brexit vote. This has had a particularly big impact on Brits living in Spain and those with homes here. We'd like to hear from our British readers to find out how their lives have been been affected.

title: Spanish PM's former right-hand man sentenced to 24 years for corruption
summary: A court in Spain on Monday sentenced a top ex-aide of Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez, former transport minister José Luis Ábalos, to 24 years in jail for graft.

title: EU to slap €3 customs duty on small parcels from July 1st
summary: Ordering parcels online from non-European Union countries will cost you a little more in future with a new EU customs duty coming into force on July 1st.

title: Sánchez meets US ambassador to Spain amid tensions with Trump
summary: Pedro Sánchez has met with Benjamin León Jr. for the first time, despite heightened tensions between the Spanish and US administrations and recent comments by the new American ambassador criticising the Spanish government.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Monday
summary: Spain's heatwave to continue, health ministry declares hantavirus outbreak case 'closed', Málaga's football team return to first division after eight years and more news on Monday June 22nd.

title: Yamal and Oyarzabal shine as Spain thrash Saudi Arabia 4-0
summary: Lamine Yamal's return sparked Spain's World Cup into life as the European champions ran riot to beat Saudi Arabia 4-0 in Atlanta.

title: Three boys die after sea rescue at Spanish beach
summary: Three boys have died after getting into difficulty while swimming at a beach near Tarragona in northeastern Spain, officials said Sunday.
